scene_1.visual_plan: The scene opens with a medium shot of the model looking directly at the camera, set in a bright and inviting room that conveys a sense of comfort and ease. Immediately after her first spoken line, a cut transitions to a close-up of the product now held in her right hand, showcasing its details and craftsmanship. The camera then returns to a medium shot of the model as she discusses her experience, capturing her expressions of satisfaction while maintaining a soft focus on the background to enhance depth of field. As she talks about her confidence, there is a smooth cut to a POV shot of the product positioned close to her face, allowing viewers to see her genuine smile and reflecting her newfound comfort with the piece.
scene_1.dialogue:
なぜもっと早くこれを試さなかったのかと後悔しています。このカップ付きキャミソールは
服のラインもきれいに見えるし、着心地のストレスもなくて、自信を持って過ごせるようになった。
